Will rhe world collapse if we dont know how infinite sequences will work? Of course not. Now, if we didnt know basic functions like addition, multiplication, etc, then we'd be in trouble.

When mathematicians originally came up with this idea it was about decimals. Not hotels. And it's actually kinda important. It was the first crack in the idea that an infinite universe is infinitely knowable. It is mathematically impossible to account for every outcome. Before this it was assumed if you had the time, knew all the rules, and had all the information.. that you could solve the universe. But if it is mathematically impossible to account for every outcome, then it is mathematically impossible to solve the universe. It caused a huge problem in physics. A whole lot of people were angry at it. Eventually it lead to entire new fields of physics and mathematics like chaos theory and quantum mechanics. Things that did not try to give an exact answer, but an answer within a range.
High or low, mathematicians can always count on the numbered stuff they imagine. 👍

Opponents say the vote could hurt the administration’s position as it tries to negotiate a deal to end the fighting with Iran.

How they found the giant squid…  This is the first ever footage of a giant squid in its natural habitat. It took decades to get this footage. And some creative engineering.  The further down into the ocean you go the darker it gets, so when scientists make their way down there with ROV’s or subs the lights and motors typically cause animals adapted for cold, dark isolation to flee.   In 2012, one scientist got creative and finally caught some incredible footage of a deep sea creature we’d never seen before in its natural habitat. Tato bisa permanen karena tubuhmu menolak menyerah. 🧬  Banyak orang ngira tato permanen karena tintanya “nempel” di kulit selamanya. Padahal kenyataannya jauh lebih aneh dari itu. 😶  Setiap kali tinta tato masuk ke kulit, tubuh langsung panik dan menganggapnya benda asing. Sel imun bernama makrofag datang buat “memakan” tinta tersebut, sama seperti saat tubuh melawan bakteri atau virus.  Masalahnya? Tinta tato nggak bisa dihancurkan.  Makrofag akhirnya mati sambil masih menyimpan tinta, lalu tintanya keluar lagi ke jaringan kulit. Setelah itu datang makrofag baru yang memakan tinta yang sama. Proses ini terjadi terus-menerus selama bertahun-tahun.  Jadi sebenarnya tato permanen itu bukan karena tinta diam di tempat… tapi karena tubuhmu terus “mengurung” tinta tersebut dalam siklus tanpa akhir. 🔄  Sebagian partikel tinta juga bisa ikut terbawa ke kelenjar getah bening lewat sistem limfatik. Peneliti bahkan menemukan beberapa tinta tato mengandung logam seperti nikel dan kobalt.  Ada penelitian terbaru yang menemukan hubungan kecil antara tato dan peningkatan risiko limfoma (kanker kelenjar getah bening). Tapi penting diingat: ini belum berarti tato langsung menyebabkan kanker. Hubungannya masih terus diteliti dan risikonya tetap tergolong rendah bagi kebanyakan orang.  Jadi di balik gambar keren di kulit, ternyata ada “perang kecil” yang berlangsung diam-diam di dalam tubuh kita setiap hari. 🔬  #Tato #FaktaTubuh #SainsMenarik

Jadi tujuan utamanya bukan sekadar gaya, tetapi membantu perawatan medis, pemulihan, atau kualitas hidup pasien. This might be the most powerful AI and data awareness video yet. The Pause Before You Post campaign from @dpcrireland shows how fast tech is moving compared to child protection. Parents now share around 63 photos of their kids every month, often without realizing how far those images can travel.  Only 20 photos are enough for AI to build a convincing deepfake. Even worse, half of the child images found on criminal forums come from public posts made by parents themselves.  The campaign shows how simple details like a child’s name, birthday, school uniform, daily routine or friend group can turn into data points for AI systems. Piece by piece, strangers can rebuild a child’s world from images that were meant to be harmless.  In a digital world where faces, habits and locations can be tracked in seconds, every upload becomes permanent data that can be copied or misused.
